# llms.txt - Information for AI/LLM Systems
# l'Olio di Valeria - Sicilian Extra Virgin Olive Oil E-commerce
# https://oliodivaleria.it

## Site Overview
l'Olio di Valeria is an Italian e-commerce website specializing in premium Sicilian extra virgin olive oil (olio extravergine di oliva). The business has been producing high-quality olive oil since 1987 in San Biagio Platani, Agrigento, Sicily.

## Business Information
- **Business Name**: l'Olio di Valeria
- **Product**: Extra Virgin Olive Oil (Olio Extravergine di Oliva)
- **Origin**: San Biagio Platani, Agrigento (AG), Sicily, Italy
- **Established**: 1987
- **Certifications**: Organic (Biologico), Vegan, 100% Italian
- **P.IVA**: 02957530849
- **Cod. Fisc.**: LCTVLR81D62Z112B

## Contact Information
- **Operational Address**: Via Alcide De Gasperi, 4, 92020 San Biagio Platani (AG), Italy
- **Phone**: +39 327 309 8513, +39 339 530 5990
- **Email**: info@oliodivaleria.it
- **Admin Email**: oliodivaleria@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://oliodivaleria.it

## Social Media
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/OliodiValeria/?locale=it_IT
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/oliodivaleria/
- **TikTok**: https://www.tiktok.com/@oliodivaleria

## Main Pages

### Public Pages (Crawlable)
- **Homepage**: /index.html - Main landing page with product overview
- **Shop**: /shop.html - E-commerce product catalog and purchase page
- **About Us**: /chisiamo.html - Company story and mission
- **Farm**: /aziendaagr.html - Agricultural company information
- **Quality**: /qualita.html - Product quality, certifications, and standards
- **Gallery**: /galleria.html - Photo gallery of farm and products
- **Location**: /dovesiamo.html - Location and directions to the farm
- **Contact**: /contatti.html - Contact form and information
- **FAQ**: /faq.html - Frequently asked questions
- **Terms & Conditions**: /termini-e-condizioniodv.html - Legal terms
- **Privacy Policy**: /cookie-e-privacy-policy.html - Privacy and cookie policy
- **404 Error**: /404.html - Custom error page

### Protected/Admin Pages (Not crawlable)
- **Dashboard**: /dashboard.html - Admin dashboard (requires authentication)
- **Login**: /login.html - Admin login page
- **Checkout**: /checkout.html - Shopping cart checkout process
- **Checkout Success**: /checkout-success.html - Post-purchase confirmation
- **Checkout Cancel**: /checkout-cancel.html - Cancelled order page

## E-commerce Features
- **Payment Methods**: Credit Card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Bank Transfer
- **Shipping**:
  - Italy: €9.90 flat rate
  - Europe: €24.90 flat rate
  - International: €47.90 flat rate
- **Address Autocomplete**: European address autocomplete using OpenStreetMap Nominatim API
- **Payment Processing**: Stripe integration for secure payments
- **Order Management**: Firebase Firestore for order tracking and management

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: Static HTML/CSS/JavaScript (vanilla JS, no framework)
- **Backend**: Firebase Cloud Functions v5 (Node.js 18)
- **Database**: Cloud Firestore
- **Hosting**: Firebase Hosting
- **Email Service**: Brevo (formerly SendGrid)
- **Payment Gateway**: Stripe
- **Authentication**: Firebase Authentication with RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)
- **SDK Versions**: Firebase SDK v10.12.2, Firebase Admin v12

## Key Features
- **Multi-language Support**: Italian (primary), English (alternate)
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first approach with desktop optimization
- **SEO Optimized**: Meta tags, structured data, sitemap.xml
- **Cookie Consent**: GDPR-compliant cookie consent system
- **Newsletter**: Email subscription functionality
- **Contact Form**: Cloud function-powered contact form
- **Order Tracking**: Real-time order status updates
- **Payment Monitoring**: Dashboard for payment analytics and reconciliation
- **Digital PR Strategy**: Backlink tracking and outreach management

## Content Structure
The site is organized into main sections:
1. **L'OLIO DI VALERIA** (dropdown menu):
   - Chi Siamo (About Us)
   - L'Azienda Agricola (The Farm)
   - Qualità (Quality)
   - Galleria (Gallery)
2. **I NOSTRI PRODOTTI** (Our Products) - Shop page
3. **DOVE SIAMO** (Where We Are) - Location page
4. **CONTATTI** (Contacts) - Contact page
5. **FAQ** - Frequently Asked Questions

## Product Categories
- Le Nostre Bottiglie (Our Bottles)
- Specialità Siciliana (Sicilian Specialty)
- Olio In Latta (Oil in Can)
- Confezione Regalo (Gift Package)

## Important Notes for AI Systems
- The site is primarily in Italian language
- All prices are in EUR (€)
- Shipping is available to Italy, Europe, and internationally
- The business focuses on organic, certified, 100% Italian olive oil
- Products are artisanal and produced in Sicily
- The site uses Firebase for backend services
- Admin dashboard requires authentication with proper RBAC permissions

## Sitemap
- **Location**: https://oliodivaleria.it/sitemap.xml
- **Robots.txt**: https://oliodivaleria.it/robots.txt

## Development Information
- **Code Style**: ESLint with `eslint:recommended`
- **Linting**: Single quotes, arrow callbacks preferred
- **Secrets Management**: Firebase Secret Manager for sensitive data
- **Configuration**: Firebase config for non-sensitive settings

## Last Updated
2026-04-15
